records.question: Which ref_calendar entries have a day number of at least 1 where the related document name is exactly Marry CV?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number >= 1 AND all_documents.document_name = 'Marry CV'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar
JOIN All_Documents ON Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date = All_Documents.Date_Stored
WHERE Ref_Calendar.Day_Number >= 1 AND All_Documents.Document_Name = 'Marry CV'
GROUP BY Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date
HAVING COUNT(All_Documents.Document_ID) >= 1

records.question: Which dates in the calendar correspond to day number 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number = 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar
WHERE Day_Number = 3

records.question: Which ref_calendar entries have a day number of at least 7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number >= 7
records.pred_sql:
SELECT calendar_date
FROM Ref_Calendar
WHERE Day_Number >= 7

records.question: Which calendar entries correspond to reviews of the Marriage and population document where the day number is at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Review' AND all_documents.document_name = 'Marriage and population' AND ref_calendar.day_number <= 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT rc.calendar_date
FROM Ref_Calendar rc
JOIN All_Documents ad ON rc.calendar_date = ad.date_stored
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON ad.document_type_code = rdt.document_type_code
WHERE rc.day_number <= 3
  AND ad.document_name = 'Marriage and population'
  AND rdt.document_type_name = 'Review'

records.question: Which dates fall on the 8th day and have both their planned and actual destruction scheduled for the same day?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number = 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date
FROM ref_calendar
INNER JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed
ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date
AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number = 8

records.question: Which calendar entries correspond to documents planned and actually destroyed on the same day where those documents are exactly of the type Book?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar
JOIN Documents_to_be_Destroyed ON Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date = Documents_to_be_Destroyed.Actual_Destruction_Date
JOIN Documents_to_be_Destroyed AS DTD2 ON Ref_Calendar.Calendar_Date = DTD2.Planned_Destruction_Date
JOIN All_Documents ON Documents_to_be_Destroyed.Document_ID = All_Documents.Document_ID
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON All_Documents.Document_Type_Code = Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Code
WHERE Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Name = 'Book'

records.question: Where are the calendar entries that correspond to documents classified exactly as Review?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Review'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT rc.Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar rc
INNER JOIN All_Documents ad ON rc.Calendar_Date = ad.Date_Stored
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON ad.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
WHERE rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'Review'
GROUP BY rc.Calendar_Date
HAVING COUNT(ad.Document_ID) > 0

records.question: Which calendar entries on day number 8 or later correspond to books named exactly Cats and me that are planned and actually destroyed on the same date?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me' AND ref_calendar.day_number >= 8 AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.calendar_date
FROM Ref_Calendar AS T1
INNER JOIN Documents_to_be_Destroyed AS T2 
    ON T1.calendar_date = T2.actual_destruction_date OR T1.calendar_date = T2.planned_destruction_date
INNER JOIN All_Documents AS T3 
    ON T2.document_id = T3.document_id
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T4 
    ON T3.document_type_code = T4.document_type_code
WHERE T1.day_number >= 8 
    AND T3.document_name = 'Cats and me' 
    AND T4.document_type_name = 'Book'

records.question: Which calendar entries have a day number of at least 7 and relate to documents named Society and tax where the document type is exactly Review?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Review' AND ref_calendar.day_number >= 7 AND all_documents.document_name = 'Society and tax'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT rc.calendar_date
FROM Ref_Calendar rc
JOIN All_Documents ad ON rc.Calendar_Date = ad.Date_Stored
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON ad.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
WHERE rc.Day_Number >= 7
  AND ad.Document_Name = 'Society and tax'
  AND rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'Review'

records.question: Where do calendar entries correspond to the book titled Hua Mulan?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND all_documents.document_name = 'Hua Mulan'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT rc.calendar_date
FROM Ref_Calendar rc
INNER JOIN All_Documents ad ON rc.Calendar_Date = ad.Date_Stored
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON ad.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
WHERE ad.Document_Name = 'Hua Mulan' AND rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'Book'
